title: Fogmog
move_pattern: Starts with Illusion (summons EyeWithTeeth), then Swipe (9 damage + 1 Strength), then randomly either Swipe Random (→ Headbutt) or Headbutt directly (→ Swipe). After the random branch resolves, cycles back to Swipe.
notes: Opens by summoning an EyeWithTeeth illusion. Then Swipe, followed by a random branch: 40% chance to Swipe again (forced to Headbutt next), or 60% chance to go straight to Headbutt (then back to Swipe). Swipe/Swipe Random both deal 9 damage and grant 1 Strength. Headbutt deals 16 damage. No move can repeat consecutively in the random branch.
